artifact_summary: Screenshot of a SCADA interface monitoring a high service pump's variable speed drive, displaying speed parameters, motor status, and runtime statistics.
artifact_blurb: A detailed SCADA system screenshot featuring a Variable Speed Drive (VSD) faceplate for a high service pump. The interface visualizes real-time operational metrics including adjustable speed parameters, current motor health status, and cumulative runtime statistics, sourced from SCADA Standards Appendix A documentation.
